title: [kimi-review] 71999ba: [SEVERITY: medium] The commit contains no actual changes. Th
description:
Commit: 71999ba63
Message: fix(routing): document and enforce mutex ordering in announce.c

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] The commit contains no actual changes. The diff shows only the commit header — no file modifications, no added documentation, no enforcement code — despite the message claiming to "document and enforce mutex ordering in announce.c." Either the changes were lost/not staged, or the commit message is misleading. An empty "fix" commit can mask a regression during bisection and gives false confidence that the issue was addressed.
